message:
bd-sup6g test(record): assert precomputed header column count

Adds a small regression assertion to the precomputed-header Vec serializer capacity-reuse test so the fixed header template is tied to the runtime value arity before exact-size encoding.

Validation: rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_fsqlite_cod1 cargo test -p fsqlite-types opt_a2_precomputed_header_vec_serializer_reuses_capacity_without_tail -- --nocapture; rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_fsqlite_cod1 cargo clippy -p fsqlite-types --all-targets -- -D warnings; rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_fsqlite_cod1 cargo fmt --check -p fsqlite-types.
